passwordMin: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character
passwordNumber: Password must contain at least 1 number
nameMin: Name must be at least {{count}} characters
nameMax: Name must be at most {{count}} characters
bioMax: Bio must be at most {{count}} characters
websiteMax: Website URL must be at most {{count}} characters
websiteInvalid: Website must be a valid URL (start with http:// or https://)
usernameMin: Username must be at least {{count}} characters
usernameMax: Username must be at most {{count}} characters
usernamePattern: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, dots, and underscores
contentMin: Content must be at least {{count}} characters
contentMax: Content must be less than {{count}} characters
imagesMin: At least one image is required
fileSizeMax: File size must be less than 8MB
fileTypeInvalid: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP are allowed
reportDescriptionRequired: Description is required when reason is OTHER
codeMin: Code must be at least {{count}} characters
codeMax: Code must be at most {{count}} characters
totpCodeLength: TOTP code must be exactly 6 digits
